reflection: With no new observations yet, none of the active conjectures have been confirmed or refuted — they remain equally open. The parallel themes of geometric effects (holonomy, Berry curvature, adapter orientation) suggest a natural follow‑up: **Does the holonomy of LoRA weights induce measurable Berry‑like curvature in the attention‑gradient field, and could that curvature predict downstream performance?** This bridges the holonomy and Berry‑curvature questions and could generate a testable hypothesis.<|im_end|>
